sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96881" key="stixoplo/kos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στῐχο-πλόκος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πλέκω</etym>) <sense id="n96881.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">versifier</tr_>, condemned by Thom.Mag.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0066.tlg001:p.189" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.189</biblScope> </bibl> R.</sense> </entryFree>
